commands.repair_reason: Manual review/contributor action is needed because the implementation looks narrow but external real behavior proof is missing; there is no concrete code repair for ClawSweeper to make.; Cleared: The diff only changes AWS error classification and worker tests; it does not alter credentials, dependencies, CI, permissions, or secret handling. commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an AWS worker classifier that treats opaque XML-only RunInstances HTTP 400 responses as retryable capacity failures and adds unit assertions for the classifier and retry predicate.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main leaves the exact opaque XML-only RunInstances 400 unclassified, and the region fallback predicate then stops instead of retrying. I did not run a live AWS reproduction.
commands.review_followup: Manual review/contributor action is needed because the implementation looks narrow but external real behavior proof is missing; there is no concrete code repair for ClawSweeper to make.

target.title: fix(worker): retry opaque AWS RunInstances failures
target.body:
Summary
- Treat opaque AWS RunInstances XML-only 400 responses as retryable capacity failures.
- Add a regression assertion for the exact error shape that previously stopped AWS region fallback after the first region.

Verification
- npm test --prefix worker -- aws.test.ts
- npm test --prefix worker -- fleet.test.ts
- npm run check --prefix worker
- npm run format:check --prefix worker
- npm run lint --prefix worker
- git diff --check

Notes
- Distill pass kept the fix at the existing AWS provisioning classifier boundary instead of adding a separate region-loop special case.
target.author: obviyus
